items.name: input
items.title: Input
items.description: An input component with exportable variants for composition.

items.name: input-otp
items.title: Input OTP
items.description: A one-time password input with individually boxed character slots, as an alternative to shadcn's default joined pill-style OTP.

items.name: input-phone
items.title: Input Phone
items.description: Phone number input with searchable country picker, backed by react-phone-number-input.
